operations.title: Jobs List.
operations.description: Use this endpoint to get a listing of Jobs. When startDate and endDate are specified, jobs returned will be filtered to the given date range (inclusive). The date field to filter on is given with dateFilterType which defaults to CreatedDate. Optionally use milestones to limit the jobs to those in the listed milestones. Optionally use sortBy to sort jobs by either CreatedDate, MilestoneDate, or ModifiedDate. CreatedDate is the default. Optionally use sortOrder to indicate newest to oldest (Descending) ordering or oldest to newest (Ascending) ordering. Ascending is the default. The pageStartIndex parameter to start looking for records should not exceed 100000 To Get Jobs: Supported includes values: contact, initalAppointment. Example: return the jobs (including initial appointment) that are prospects and were modified in April sorted most recent first (descending ModifiedDate) */jobs?pageSize=25&includes=initialAppointment&filterByDate=ModifiedDate&startDate=2021-04-01&endDate=2021-04-30&sortBy=ModifiedDate&sortOrder=Descending* To Get Unassigned Jobs: Supported includes values: contact. Example: return the unassigned jobs (including contacts) that were modified in March sorted most recent first (descending ModifiedDate) */jobs?assignment=unassigned&pageSize=25&includes=contacts&filterByDate=ModifiedDate&startDate=2025-03-01&endDate=2025-03-30&sortBy=ModifiedDate&sortOrder=Descending* *jobs?assignment=unassigned&milestones=Lead&pageSize=25&includes=contacts&filterByDate=ModifiedDate&startDate=2025-03-01&endDate=2025-03-30* Example: return the unassigned jobs (including contacts) that were marked as Dead */jobs?assignment=unassigned&milestones=Dead&pageSize=25&includes=contacts&filterByDate=ModifiedDate&startDate=2025-03-01&endDate=2025-03-30*

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: How many items to be returned at a time.

parameters.name: recordStartIndex
parameters.description: The index of the first element to return

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Optional fields to include in full with the response.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for the query, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for the query, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: dateFilterType
parameters.description: The date field to which startDate/endDate apply. Ignored when neither startDate nor endDate is given.

parameters.name: milestones
parameters.description: Include only jobs currently in one of the listed milestones. Enter one or more values, separated by commas. The default is no milestone filtering. Possible values: lead, prospect, approved, completed, invoiced, closed, cancelled, dead. Note: When filtering for dead leads ensure that the assignment is set to unassigned, otherwise no results will be returned.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: sort the returned jobs by this date field.

operations.title: Get subscriptions
operations.description: Retrieves all webhook subscriptions for your company. This endpoint returns a paginated list of webhook subscriptions, including: - Subscription status (enabled/disabled) - Consumer URLs where webhook events are sent - Technical contact information - Topics each subscription is listening for. - Integration type of the current subscription. Use the pagination parameters to control the number of results returned. Use the subscription status filter to narrow results by subscription state.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Controls how many items are returned per page in paginated responses. - Default: 25 items per page if not specified - Minimum: 1 item per page - Use with pageStartIndex for navigating through large result sets

parameters.name: pageStartIndex
parameters.description: Specifies the starting position for paginated results. - Default: 0 (first page) if not specified - Minimum: 0 - Example: pageStartIndex=25 with pageSize=25 returns the second page of results

parameters.name: subscriptionStatusQueryFilter
parameters.description: Filters subscriptions by their current status. Allowed values: - All: Returns all subscriptions regardless of status (default) - Active: Returns only active subscriptions - Inactive: Returns only inactive subscriptions When omitted, defaults to "All" and returns all subscriptions.

webhookEvents.title: Job Financials Approved Value Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Financials Approved Value Changed Webhook Triggered when a job's approved financial value is modified. Payload includes: * Job ID and modification timestamp * New approved value amount * Approver user reference * Direct API links to financial details and full job record The event payload contains both financial data and webhook metadata for integration processing.

webhookEvents.title: Contact Added Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Contact Added Webhook Triggered when a new contact record is created in the system. Payload includes: * Contact's unique identifier * Creation timestamp * Direct API link to access the contact's full details The event payload contains both contact-specific data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

webhookEvents.title: Contact Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Contact Changed Webhook Triggered when any contact details are modified in the system. Payload includes: * Contact's unique identifier * Modification timestamp * Direct API link to access the updated contact's details The event payload contains both the modified contact data and webhook event metadata for tracking changes.

webhookEvents.title: Contact Custom Field Status Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Contact Custom Field Status Changed Webhook Triggered when a custom field's status is modified for a contact record. Payload includes: * Custom field's unique identifier * Updated status value * Modification timestamp * User reference who made the change The event payload contains both the status change details and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

webhookEvents.title: Contact Custom Field Value Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Contact Custom Field Value Changed Webhook Triggered when a custom field value is modified for a contact record. Payload includes: * Custom field's unique identifier * Updated field value * Modification timestamp * User reference who made the change The event payload contains both the modified custom field data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

webhookEvents.title: Job Invoice Updated Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Invoice Updated Webhook Triggered when an invoice associated with a job is modified. Payload includes: * Invoice totals and collection amounts * Update timestamp and modifier information * Direct API links to full invoice details and job record * Financial breakdown including cost and price totals Provides complete invoice update data with event metadata for financial system integration.

webhookEvents.title: Job Invoice Voided Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Invoice Voided Webhook Triggered when an invoice associated with a job is marked as void. Payload includes: * Void date and responsible user * Invoice identification details * Direct API links to voided invoice and job record * Audit information about the void action Provides complete documentation of invoice voiding with event metadata for financial auditing systems.

webhookEvents.title: Job Accounting Integration Status Current Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Accounting Integration Status Current Changed Webhook Triggered when a job's accounting integration status changes in the system. Payload includes: * Current integration status state * Job identifier * Direct API link to access full accounting integration details * Event metadata with timestamps and subscription context The event payload contains both accounting status details and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

webhookEvents.title: Job Category Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Category Changed Webhook Triggered when a job's category is modified. Payload includes: * Job ID with direct API link * Previous and new category details * Webhook event metadata The event payload contains both job-specific data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

webhookEvents.title: Job Contact Primary Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Contact Primary Changed Webhook Triggered when a job's primary contact is modified. Payload includes: * Job ID with direct API link * Contact information with direct API link * Webhook event metadata The event payload contains both job-specific data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

webhookEvents.title: Job Created Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Created Webhook Triggered when a new job is created in the system. Payload includes: * Full job metadata including creation timestamp * Primary contact details * Location information * Lead source and categorization * Direct API links to job and related resources Suitable for initial synchronization with external systems.

webhookEvents.title: Job Custom Field Status Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Custom Field Status Changed Webhook Triggered when a job's custom field status is updated in the system. Payload includes: * Job's unique identifier * Custom field's system ID * Previous and updated status values * Modification timestamp * User reference who initiated the change Includes complete field status history and direct API links for both the job and custom field resources.

webhookEvents.title: Job Custom Field Value Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Custom Field Value Changed Webhook Triggered when a custom field value is updated within a job record. Payload includes: * Job's unique identifier * Custom field's system ID * Previous and updated values * Modification timestamp * User reference who initiated the change Includes complete field history and direct API links for both the job and custom field resources.

webhookEvents.title: Job Appointments Initial Created Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Appointments Initial Created Webhook Triggered when an initial appointment is created for a job. Payload includes: * Job ID with direct API link * Company representative details * Initial appointment start date * Webhook event metadata The event payload contains both job-specific data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

webhookEvents.title: Job Appointments Initial Updated Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Appointments Initial Updated Webhook Triggered when an existing initial appointment is updated for a job. Payload includes: * Job ID with direct API link * Updated company representative details * Revised initial appointment start date * Webhook event metadata The event payload contains both updated job-specific data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

webhookEvents.title: Job Milestone Current Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Milestone Current Changed Webhook Triggered when a job's current milestone is updated. Payload includes: * New milestone details and activation date * User who changed the milestone * Direct API links to full milestone and job records * Current status indicator Provides complete milestone transition data with event metadata for workflow tracking systems.

webhookEvents.title: Job Milestone Status Current Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Milestone Status Current Changed Webhook Triggered when a milestone's current status is updated within a job. Payload includes: * Updated status details and transition timestamp * Responsible user for the status change * Workflow status information * Direct API links to full status details, milestone, and job records

webhookEvents.title: Job Primary Contact Changed/Added Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Primary Contact Changed/Added Webhook Triggered when the primary contact association changes for a job. Payload includes: * Job ID and timestamp * Contact relationship details * Direct API links to job and contact resources Provides complete event metadata along with the updated contact association details.

webhookEvents.title: Job Representatives Company Assigned Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Representatives Company Assigned Webhook Triggered when a company representative is initially assigned to a job. Payload includes: * Job ID and assignment timestamp * Representative user details * Direct API links to job and representative resources Provides complete event metadata with the initial company representative assignment.

webhookEvents.title: Job Representatives Company Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Representatives Company Changed Webhook Triggered when an existing company representative assignment is modified for a job. Payload includes: * Job ID and modification timestamp * Previous and current representative details * Direct API links to job and representative resources Provides complete event metadata with before/after representative information.

webhookEvents.title: Job Trade Type Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Trade Type Changed Webhook Triggered when a job's trade type classification is modified. Payload includes: * Job ID and modification timestamp * Trade type details (system default or custom) * Direct API link to job resource Distinguishes between system-defined and custom trade type configurations.

webhookEvents.title: Job Updated Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Updated Webhook Triggered when any job, primary contact, job details are modified. Payload includes: * Complete current job state snapshot * Updated contact and location details * Work type and categorization changes * Direct API links to job and related resources Provides full system-of-record state for external synchronization.

webhookEvents.title: Job Work Type Changed Webhook
webhookEvents.description: Job Work Type Changed Webhook Triggered when a job's work type classification is modified. Payload includes: * Job ID and modification timestamp * Work type details (system default or custom) * Direct API link to job resource Distinguishes between system-defined and custom work type configurations.

sources.title: Jobs List.
sources.summary: Use this endpoint to get a listing of Jobs. When startDate and endDate are specified, jobs returned will be filtered to the given date range (inclusive). The date field to filter on is given with dateFilterType which defaults to CreatedDate. Optionally use milestones to limit the jobs to those in the listed milestones. Optionally use sortBy to sort jobs by either CreatedDate, MilestoneDate, or ModifiedDate. CreatedDate is the default. Optionally use sortOrder to indicate newest to oldest (Descending) ordering or oldest to newest (Ascending) ordering. Ascending is the default. The pageStartIndex parameter to start looking for records should not exceed 100000 To Get Jobs: Supported includes values: contact, initalAppointment. Example: return the jobs (including initial appointment) that are prospects and were modified in April sorted most recent first (descending ModifiedDate) */jobs?pageSize=25&includes=initialAppointment&filterByDate=ModifiedDate&startDate=2021-04-01&endDate=2021-04-30&sortBy=ModifiedDate&sortOrder=Descending* To Get Unassigned Jobs: Supported includes values: contact. Example: return the unassigned jobs (including contacts) that were modified in March sorted most recent first (descending ModifiedDate) */jobs?assignment=unassigned&pageSize=25&includes=contacts&filterByDate=ModifiedDate&startDate=2025-03-01&endDate=2025-03-30&sortBy=ModifiedDate&sortOrder=Descending* *jobs?assignment=unassigned&milestones=Lead&pageSize=25&includes=contacts&filterByDate=ModifiedDate&startDate=2025-03-01&endDate=2025-03-30* Example: return the unassigned jobs (including contacts) that were marked as Dead */jobs?assignment=unassigned&milestones=Dead&pageSize=25&includes=contacts&filterByDate=ModifiedDate&startDate=2025-03-01&endDate=2025-03-30*

sources.title: Jobs Search.
sources.summary: Use this endpoint to get a listing of jobs matching the given search criteria. Jobs are returned if they include a given search term and/or they are near a given set of map coordinates. At least one of searchTerm or geoLocation must be included. If both are included, jobs returned must match both criteria. The size of the return is controlled with the pageSize query parameter which defaults to 10 and must be > 0 and = 0 to access jobs past the first page when more than pageSize jobs meet the search criteria. The StartIndex parameter to start looking for records should not exceed 100000 Unassigned leads or jobs will not be returned. Supported includes values: contact, initalAppointment. Example: return up to 25 jobs (including initial appointment) that contain "Maple Lane" and are within 1 kilometer of the map location (40.689247,-74.044502). /jobs/search?pageSize=25&includes=initialAppointment { "searchTerm": "Maple Lane", "geoLocation": { "latitude": 40.689247, "longitude": -74.044502, "mapRadius" 1 } }

If the scheduled report doesn't have any recipient the response will be an Empty response.

sources.title: Get all the items for a specific supplement.
sources.summary: Use this endpoint to get a list of items for a specific supplement in the current location. StartIndex starts at 0. The default PageSize is 25. Pagination parameters are optional. Example: api/v2/supplements/{supplementId}/items?pageSize=25&pageStartIndex=0

sources.title: Get all the notations for a specific supplement.
sources.summary: Use this endpoint to get a list of notations for a specific supplement in the current location. StartIndex starts at 0. The default PageSize is 25. Pagination parameters are optional. Example: api/v2/supplements/{supplementId}/notations?pageSize=25&pageStartIndex=0

sources.title: Get all the supplements across the company.
sources.summary: Use this endpoint to get a list of supplements for the current location. StartIndex starts at 0. Default PageSize is 25. Pagination parameters are optional. Supported includes values: items, notations. Example: api/v2/supplements?pageSize=25&pageStartIndex=0&includes=items,notations&jobId=e591bf22-9828-4144-bca8-42cbb8c6e2c0

sources.title: Get supplement by the given ID.
sources.summary: Use this endpoint to get a particular supplement for the current location.

sources.title: Get User
sources.summary: Use this endpoint to get the details of a specific user.

sources.title: Get Users
sources.summary: Use this endpoint to get the list of users for a company. The status filter can be used to filter users based on status - active, inactive, archived, or deleted. By default, only active users will be returned. This endpoint will return a paginated response starting from the given record index.

sources.title: Delete subscription by id
sources.summary: Permanently deletes a subscription. Once deleted: - The subscription will no longer receive any webhook events - The subscription cannot be recovered - Any new events for the topics it was listening to will not be sent Use this endpoint when you no longer need a particular webhook subscription.

sources.title: Get subscription
sources.summary: Retrieves detailed information about a specific subscription. This endpoint returns comprehensive details about the requested subscription: - Creation and last modification dates - Consumer URL where webhook events are sent - Technical contact information - Current status (enabled/disabled) - List of topics this subscription is listening for - Integration type of the current subscription Use this endpoint when you need to check the configuration of a specific subscription.

sources.title: Get subscriptions
sources.summary: Retrieves all webhook subscriptions for your company. This endpoint returns a paginated list of webhook subscriptions, including: - Subscription status (enabled/disabled) - Consumer URLs where webhook events are sent - Technical contact information - Topics each subscription is listening for. - Integration type of the current subscription. Use the pagination parameters to control the number of results returned. Use the subscription status filter to narrow results by subscription state.

sources.title: Send a test event
sources.summary: Sends a test event to your webhook endpoint. This is extremely useful for: - Verifying your webhook receiver is properly configured - Testing your event handling logic - Confirming connectivity between AccuLynx and your systems You must specify a valid topic name in the request body. The test event will be sent to the consumer URL associated with this subscription, regardless of whether the subscription is actually listening for that specific topic.

sources.title: Create Subscription
sources.summary: Creates a new webhook subscription for your company. You must provide: - A valid consumer URL where webhook events will be sent - A technical contact email for notifications about the subscription - At least one topic name to subscribe to - An integration type that indicates the purpose of the subscription Upon successful creation, you'll receive a subscription ID that you can use to manage this subscription.

sources.title: Update subscription by id
sources.summary: Updates an existing subscription. You can modify: - The technical contact email address - The list of topics this subscription is listening for Note that you cannot update the consumer URL after creation. If you need to change the URL, you must delete this subscription and create a new one.

sources.title: Get topics
sources.summary: Retrieves all available webhook topics you can subscribe to. This endpoint returns a paginated list of all active topics, including: - Topic names that you can use when creating or updating subscriptions - Descriptions explaining what events each topic represents Use this endpoint to discover what events you can receive through webhooks.

sources.title: Contact Added Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a new contact record is created in the system. Payload includes: * Contact's unique identifier * Creation timestamp * Direct API link to access the contact's full details The event payload contains both contact-specific data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

sources.title: Contact Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when any contact details are modified in the system. Payload includes: * Contact's unique identifier * Modification timestamp * Direct API link to access the updated contact's details The event payload contains both the modified contact data and webhook event metadata for tracking changes.

sources.title: Contact Custom Field Status Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a custom field's status is modified for a contact record. Payload includes: * Custom field's unique identifier * Updated status value * Modification timestamp * User reference who made the change The event payload contains both the status change details and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

sources.title: Contact Custom Field Value Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a custom field value is modified for a contact record. Payload includes: * Custom field's unique identifier * Updated field value * Modification timestamp * User reference who made the change The event payload contains both the modified custom field data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

sources.title: Job Created Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a new job is created in the system. Payload includes: * Full job metadata including creation timestamp * Primary contact details * Location information * Lead source and categorization * Direct API links to job and related resources Suitable for initial synchronization with external systems.

sources.title: Job Updated Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when any job, primary contact, job details are modified. Payload includes: * Complete current job state snapshot * Updated contact and location details * Work type and categorization changes * Direct API links to job and related resources Provides full system-of-record state for external synchronization.

sources.title: Job Accounting Integration Status Current Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a job's accounting integration status changes in the system. Payload includes: * Current integration status state * Job identifier * Direct API link to access full accounting integration details * Event metadata with timestamps and subscription context The event payload contains both accounting status details and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

sources.title: Job Appointments Initial Created Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when an initial appointment is created for a job. Payload includes: * Job ID with direct API link * Company representative details * Initial appointment start date * Webhook event metadata The event payload contains both job-specific data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

sources.title: Job Appointments Initial Updated Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when an existing initial appointment is updated for a job. Payload includes: * Job ID with direct API link * Updated company representative details * Revised initial appointment start date * Webhook event metadata The event payload contains both updated job-specific data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

sources.title: Job Category Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a job's category is modified. Payload includes: * Job ID with direct API link * Previous and new category details * Webhook event metadata The event payload contains both job-specific data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

sources.title: Job Contact Primary Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a job's primary contact is modified. Payload includes: * Job ID with direct API link * Contact information with direct API link * Webhook event metadata The event payload contains both job-specific data and webhook event metadata for comprehensive tracking and processing.

sources.title: Job Custom Field Status Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a job's custom field status is updated in the system. Payload includes: * Job's unique identifier * Custom field's system ID * Previous and updated status values * Modification timestamp * User reference who initiated the change Includes complete field status history and direct API links for both the job and custom field resources.

sources.title: Job Custom Field Value Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a custom field value is updated within a job record. Payload includes: * Job's unique identifier * Custom field's system ID * Previous and updated values * Modification timestamp * User reference who initiated the change Includes complete field history and direct API links for both the job and custom field resources.

sources.title: Job Financials Approved Value Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a job's approved financial value is modified. Payload includes: * Job ID and modification timestamp * New approved value amount * Approver user reference * Direct API links to financial details and full job record The event payload contains both financial data and webhook metadata for integration processing.

sources.title: Job Invoice Updated Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when an invoice associated with a job is modified. Payload includes: * Invoice totals and collection amounts * Update timestamp and modifier information * Direct API links to full invoice details and job record * Financial breakdown including cost and price totals Provides complete invoice update data with event metadata for financial system integration.

sources.title: Job Invoice Voided Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when an invoice associated with a job is marked as void. Payload includes: * Void date and responsible user * Invoice identification details * Direct API links to voided invoice and job record * Audit information about the void action Provides complete documentation of invoice voiding with event metadata for financial auditing systems.

sources.title: Job Milestone Current Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a job's current milestone is updated. Payload includes: * New milestone details and activation date * User who changed the milestone * Direct API links to full milestone and job records * Current status indicator Provides complete milestone transition data with event metadata for workflow tracking systems.

sources.title: Job Milestone Status Current Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a milestone's current status is updated within a job. Payload includes: * Updated status details and transition timestamp * Responsible user for the status change * Workflow status information * Direct API links to full status details, milestone, and job records

sources.title: Job Primary Contact Changed/Added Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when the primary contact association changes for a job. Payload includes: * Job ID and timestamp * Contact relationship details * Direct API links to job and contact resources Provides complete event metadata along with the updated contact association details.

sources.title: Job Representatives Company Assigned Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a company representative is initially assigned to a job. Payload includes: * Job ID and assignment timestamp * Representative user details * Direct API links to job and representative resources Provides complete event metadata with the initial company representative assignment.

sources.title: Job Representatives Company Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when an existing company representative assignment is modified for a job. Payload includes: * Job ID and modification timestamp * Previous and current representative details * Direct API links to job and representative resources Provides complete event metadata with before/after representative information.

sources.title: Job Trade Type Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a job's trade type classification is modified. Payload includes: * Job ID and modification timestamp * Trade type details (system default or custom) * Direct API link to job resource Distinguishes between system-defined and custom trade type configurations.

sources.title: Job Work Type Changed Webhook
sources.summary: Triggered when a job's work type classification is modified. Payload includes: * Job ID and modification timestamp * Work type details (system default or custom) * Direct API link to job resource Distinguishes between system-defined and custom work type configurations.
